name: coretex-evaluator-v2-dgen1-policy-r5
_reclaimedRegionsNote: r5 PROTOCOL EPOCH: the RetrievalKeys (384-671) + Codebook (896-991) WORDS are reclaimed for typed PolicyAtoms. Their STATIC forms (dense lens, static EvidencePolicy) failed empirically — r5 reuses their words, not their semantics. Under this r5 pin, RetrievalKeys are NOT decoded as a dense lens (lens/anchor knobs INERT) and the words 384-671 read as evidence-bundle(384-511)/conflict_lifecycle(512-639)/abstention(640-671) atoms; 896-991 is reserved r5 policy capacity (MUST be zero).

firstStageTopKSelection.reason: inherited from deep-r1; calibration unchanged for the r5 epoch.

_r5PolicyNote: ★ LAUNCH-FROZEN r5 substrate (2026-05-25): TWO active honest public surfaces, validated on real Qwen — (B) RELATION-TYPED ROUTING and (A) GUARDED ABSTENTION. (B) = enableEvidenceBundleAtoms + policyQueryConditionedAdmission + policyRelationTypedAdmission: the host supplies the PUBLIC entity registry (policyEntityRegistry, runtime not signed); the scorer parses a PUBLIC relation-intent from the query text (parseQueryRelationIntent) and admits ONLY the matched anchor's reach along the intent-typed edges, injecting NOTHING when no relation intent parses. 3-seed real-Qwen launch validation (r5-relation-typed-validate-gpu.json): routing-slice +0.022..+0.038 all seeds, off-intent damage EXACTLY 0, overall +0.012..+0.021 vs no-atoms, random-selector 0, no-op==r4 (maxAbsDelta 0); ENTITY-only admission (no relation typing) is net -0.08..-0.10 (off-family -0.20). policyMaxBudgetEvidence clamped to 250 (beta 0.25 = the validated value; anti-flood). (A) = enableAbstentionAtoms SPLIT: miner carries the public no-evidence-path selector (MISSING_EVIDENCE + REQUIRE_NO_EVIDENCE_PATH); operator gates on top1<policyAbstentionTop1Threshold(0.9995) AND top1-top2 margin<policyAbstentionMarginThreshold(0.0003) — real-Qwen sweep cut false-abstention 8.9%->3.3% at 73% recall (r5-abstention-margin-gpu.json). RESERVED (format-decoded but scorer-OFF until separately validated): C conflict_lifecycle (enableConflictLifecycleAtoms=false; needs directional-supersedes corpus), D bundle-shape (needs graded corroboration), E cap/budget (needs deep 100k cap-binding corpus), F aspect, future typed selectors. Subject-scope/noise REMAIN RESERVED. r4 path identical + r5-no-atoms==r4 is a hard gate.
_candidateNote: DGEN-1 r5 PolicyAtom LAUNCH CANDIDATE (pending final baseline sign-off), derived from evaluator-profile-v2-dgen1-deep-r1.json with pipelineVersion bumped to coretex-retrieval-v2-policy-r5. ★ SUBSTRATE FROZEN (2026-05-25, commit 9fd9238): ACTIVE = (B) relation-typed routing + (A) guarded abstention, both real-Qwen launch-validated; RESERVED scorer-OFF = conflict-lifecycle/bundle-shape/cap-budget/aspect/subject/noise. r5-no-atoms==r4 verified exact (maxAbsDelta 0); profile-replay 12/12 + plumbing-gate ALL GREEN. baseline NOW PINNED on the dgen1-r5-synth genesis pack (baselineParentScorePpm 304958, real Qwen; see _baselineNote). REMAINING for final PRODUCTION sign: (1) re-pin baseline on the PRODUCTION launch corpus with samples>=3; (2) majorDeltaThreshold=10 recalibrated to ~5% of the launch corpus eval_hidden population. All r4 knobs identical to deep-r1. [300k-rescaled: activeWindow=3072 (1324 reserve at genesis; ≈70% of 4396 eval_hidden); majorDeltaThreshold=220 (≈5% of 4396 eval_hidden).]
_majorDeltaThresholdNote: Recalibrated 2026-05-27 to 7 = ~5% of the final launch corpus eval_hidden population (dgen1-r5-synth, 141 eval_hidden). POLICY is 5% (relative); PINNED as an absolute count (7) for THIS corpus epoch and re-pinned to 5% of the new population whenever a corpus epoch materially grows eval_hidden. Triggered ONLY by corpusRootChanged (NOT activeRoot churn — distinct triggers per epochFrontier). On growth >=7 new eval_hidden, isMajorDelta -> 1-epoch difficulty grace (threshold frozen) while the baseline recomputes on the grown corpus. At the measured churn-replenishment of ~2 eval_hidden/epoch, a 7-unit (5%) delta accumulates over ~3-4 epochs so grace fires periodically, not every epoch (avoids the perpetual-grace failure mode of a too-small threshold).
_controllerNote: Identical launch controller calibration to deep-r1 (qualityHighThresholdMult=1, rampUpMaxRatio 1.1). Sourced via controllerParamsFromProfile().
_epochFrontierNote: LAUNCH-REQUIRED churn (2026-05-27). EpochFrontier C3 adaptive watermark controller; activeWindow=141 = the genesis eval_hidden working set (full-active at genesis, 0 reserve → C3 idles until corpus growth fills the reserve, then rotates + recomputes baseline on activeRootChanged). Aggregate-only churn (no per-query oracle); retirement by age/cohort. baselineRecompute=activeRootChanged and majorDeltaPolicy=corpusRootChanged are DISTINCT triggers. Determinism + recompute + replay reconstruction proven by scripts/churn-launch-e2e.mjs; mechanism (rotation under reserve) by scripts/frontier-determinism-smoke.mjs.
_baselineNote: Re-pinned 2026-05-27 on the dgen1-r5-synth GENESIS hidden pack (epoch 0, eval seed below, packSize 53), real Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B, parent = empty substrate (r5-no-atoms == r4). samples=3 on a byte-deterministic A100 → variancePpm 0 (304958 reproduced exactly; samples>=3 confirms determinism, validating samples=1+replayTolerance on a single calibrated host). Genesis activeWindow=141 = full eval_hidden so the genesis active-frontier baseline == the full-pack baseline (churn does not shift the genesis pin). conflict_state + churn ENABLED at this pin (empty-parent score unaffected: no conflict atoms present, no reserve to rotate).
